creator: ady@earthling.net
text:
New patches that make obsolete the old ones:
  * pine4.Jul13.diff.gz    - patch against what there is currently in
mail/pine4
  * pine4.Jul13.tar.gz    - archive of updated port

ATTENTION ! These files make obsolete the previous submitted files. *Do
not* use the previous files !

Just a note: in case you will use the .diff. file: following
files/directories are *removed*:
  * files/Makefile
  * patches/patch-aa
  * patches/patch-ad
  * patches/patch-ae
  * patches/patch-ag
  * patches/patch-ah
  * patches/patch-ao
  * patches/patch-ap
  * scripts/
and the followinf file has appeared:
  * patches/patch-ar

Again, this is against what there is in CVS repository, do *not* use
previous files!

 Thanks,
  Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)
